ticket.description: The payroll synchronization job timed out after a deployment and needs runtime recovery.

knowledge.selected_solution: Reset the payroll sync worker and confirm the downstream health checks.

alternatives.reason: The worker reset path is documented and lower risk.

risks: Confirm no duplicate payroll jobs are active before resolving the ticket.

actions.description: Share the recovery plan with stakeholders.
Move the ticket to resolved after the runtime validation.
